item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-19
item.description: Set up website build environment on Linux, debugged translation pipeline failures, and fixed cross-platform compatibility issues

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-18
item.description: Encountered persistent authentication issues preventing any work throughout the day

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-17
item.description: Created task-switching checkpoint skill, enhanced MeetingHelper with multi-language ASR, Metal GPU acceleration, and real-time noise suppression, then conducted comprehensive website code review fixing 11 bugs including critical CSS layout issue

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-16
item.description: Refactored error recovery demo collection system with simplified validation codebase and relaxed quota rules, and installed agent-skills plugin globally for Claude Code

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-15
item.description: Systematically debugged and resolved ErrorRecovery robotics project environment setup, fixing 5 critical bugs blocking Coffee task execution, then established full reproducibility by tracking modified dependencies and creating automated patch system for cluster deployment

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-14
item.description: 已经完成了5个MIHD核心模块的开发，包括HD数据集支持、标签混合分析、ARI稳定性测试、补丁大小实验以及邻域查询集成。此外，还将18GB的检查点数据上传到了athena服务器上。同时，我们解决了TokenMonitor项目中的git冲突问题，实现了错误恢复基准测试流程和数据收集工作流。另外，我们还制作了6个任务成功案例的视频。在Tianhe服务器上，我们配置了独立的Claude代码环境，并修复了与gadget rclone配置相关的问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-13
item.description: All four projects have achieved significant milestones: the draft manuscript for the MIHD paper has been completed, along with the development of multimodal fusion diagnosis technology. The MeetingHelper dual-audio transcription system has been upgraded. The architecture for error recovery benchmark tests has been established, and the outline of the NeurIPS report has been finalized. The bugs in the BOSS LeRobot process have also been fixed. Additionally, progress has been made in the research on basic models related to batteries.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W15
item.description: Extraordinarily productive week spanning academic research, production systems, and development infrastructure across 12+ major projects. Delivered complete production-ready systems (LifeCopilot architecture upgrade with 7 OpenClaw features, meeting-helper AI assistant, BetterSSH terminal multiplexer, gadget bilingual pipeline). Completed major research infrastructure: MIHD spatial omics paper revisions with 3 new cross-slice experiments revealing clustering-retrieval trade-offs, benchmark planning framework (2246-line blueprint), and NeurIPS academic writing methodology from 61 paper reviews. Implemented MimicGen error recovery framework with faithful augmentation architecture, 626-scene human collection workflow, and 6 critical bug fixes. Established robust tooling: TokenMonitor pricing accuracy with OpenRouter integration for 3000+ models, unified Claude Code permissions, timezone-aware SSH handling. Fixed Hugo deployment pipeline from complete failure to operational, migrated translation infrastructure to local Ollama eliminating cloud API dependencies. Debugged fundamental ML pipeline issues (BOSS dataset mapping, Crossformer architecture mismatch, battery NaN propagation). Resolved 20+ critical blockers across data correctness, authentication security, and model compatibility.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-12
item.description: Two advanced research process developments in these projects: the planning of MIHD spatial transcriptomics benchmark tests, as well as documentation and troubleshooting related to error recovery.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-11
item.description: 跨四台设备的高强度技术工作日：完成BetterSSH全栈项目从零到生产、优化多项目开发工具链、深度重构MimicGen增广系统、构建NeurIPS学术写作框架、扩展语音识别后端

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-10
item.description: 多项目开发日：完成了MIHD基准测试论文的撰写工作，解决了MeetingHelper与Screenpipe之间的兼容性问题，调试了LIBERO和电池训练流程，实现了OpenClaw功能，同时避免了技术上的债务问题。此外，还提升了TokenMonitor的定价准确性，以更好地满足Claude的需求。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-09
item.description: Cross-device full-stack development day: Optimized the robot learning process on Tianhe platform (including MimicGen analysis, human data collection workflows, and multi-data set comparative learning). Resolved infrastructure issues such as Node proxy and Claude code permissions. Reconstructed key components, implementing Chinese-to-English translation functionality via Ollama. Also completed two major architecture upgrades (e.g., integrating LifeCopilot with OpenClaw, adding 70 new test scenarios; developing meeting assistance features from scratch using Screenpipe and MCP). Additionally, improved TokenMonitor with timezone-aware SSH processing and user interface animation optimizations.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-08
item.description: 已经完成了跨平台代码优化和翻译功能的自动化处理，涉及多个高性能计算/机器人项目。调试了三个机器学习数据管道，并将翻译基础设施迁移到本地Ollama平台上。此外，还重新设计了机器人增强系统，将动作回放模式转换为目标姿态执行模式。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: 修复 website/update.sh 的 4 个脚本 Bug 并搭建完整 Hugo 部署环境，网站更新流程从完全失败恢复到 7 步全部通过，同时启动全量日报/周报 MCP 同步流程

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: 完成MIHD论文草稿三条编辑批注的规划与执行，包括重写Intro P1、扩充Abstract和R5/R6，同时运行三组新跨切片query实验并修复HD Niche Query可视化

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W14
item.description: Intensive multi-project development week covering spatial transcriptomics research (MIHD paper experiments with TEDDY-G foundation model and Visium HD fusion benchmarks), cross-platform desktop application debugging (TokenMonitor Linux GTK architectural fixes culminating in fixed-window + input-shape redesign), backend service overhaul (Life-Copilot Discord Bot refactored to CLI Agent architecture with -2823 LOC), and research infrastructure (NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track literature survey + new Linux workstation setup). Key achievements: confirmed STAIG fusion framework robustness across gene encoders, established zero-shot FM embedding fusion research positioning, eliminated Linux WM geometry drift through architectural redesign, and delivered Screen Time Tracker + Feishu integration + 11-tier AI fallback chain.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-05
item.description: 我们已经完成了Linux FloatBall fixed window + GDK Input Shape架构的重构工作，这一重构旨在彻底解决平台级别的几何偏移问题。同时，我们也系统地解决了Life-Copilot Discord Bot中存在的结构化日志缺失以及MCP工具遭遇权限拒绝这两大问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-04
item.description: 深度调试并修复 TokenMonitor FloatBall 在 Linux 下的多个系统级 bug（GTK 尺寸协商根本问题、WM clamp 定位偏移等），完成 NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track 63 篇论文系统性研究调研，以及 Life-Copilot 多项重大功能落地（Discord Bot 架构重构净删 2823 行、Screen Time Tracker 全量实现、飞书 Bot 快速想法捕获、Codex/Anthropic 后端接入），并探索 AionUI 远程 SSH 接入可行性。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: MIHD项目已经完成了关于HD融合的额外实验，整理了论文中的叙述线索，并开始撰写双语框架。我们专注于零样本FM嵌入融合技术的研究。TokenMonitor已经更新，修复了Rust编译过程中的错误；而Linux GTK窗口定位问题的修复工作也在进行中。Gadget已经完成了两轮rclone双向同步测试，并调查了NIPS研究数据的存储位置。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-02
item.description: Dual-device collaboration: DCC is responsible for building the experimental framework for the MIHD paper (using GPU Slurm scripts and three visualization scripts). DesktopLinux will fix the platform bugs of TokenMonitor in Linux/Wayland, as well as address the 21 code review issues mentioned in PR #4. These issues have been uploaded to GitHub. Additionally, DesktopLinux will initialize the new machine’s environment and configure the Claude Code development tools.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-01
item.description: DCC端完成Leiden全量对比实验（核心结论：高质量embedding优于聚类方法选择）并创建HD niche query可视化；DesktopLinux端完成新Linux工作站系统初始化、TokenMonitor Tauri构建，并两轮迭代修复了悬浮球在Linux上的位置跳变与收起残影跨平台Bug。

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-03
item.description: March 2026 achieved transformative breakthroughs across AI systems, robotics, and research infrastructure through systematic application of evolving constraint methodology. Error Recovery Benchmark completed v5.0 architectural redesign shifting from online physics injection to offline trajectory-based VLA context replay, while CalendarPro eliminated single-intent bottleneck via multi-intent LLM classification. Gadget toolkit evolved from quick-overview to deep-excavation research system supporting arbitrary-scale full-text analysis through chunked LLM merge, integrated with MCP server transformation and rclone sync infrastructure establishing clear git-vs-data boundaries. MIHD spatial transcriptomics proved Foundation Models achieve 100% cross-section retrieval vs 14% for PCA while discovering STAIG’s surprising robustness to gene encoder choice. TokenMonitor completed cross-platform migration with polished float ball UI, and ccplan skill introduced 10-phase requirement engineering with adversarial review catching 12+ critical issues pre-implementation. Month exposed recurring patterns of dependency version fragility, documentation drift, and LLM JSON instability while demonstrating 4x speedup via wave-based parallel agent execution and 81% demo reduction through Recovery Behavior Grouping taxonomy.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: 为 MIHD 论文准备完成了本周工作规划、Leiden 聚类集成、STHD Ground Truth 集成，并成功运行 DLPFC Leiden baseline 与 HD 全流程评估，获得关键实验数据

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: 完成 TEDDY-G 400M 基因基础模型在 DLPFC 全量 11 个切片上的 embedding 提取与多策略融合 benchmark，并撰写 W13 周报总结上周实验发现。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W13
item.description: Executed major architectural improvements across three tracks: (1) gadget toolkit refactoring—transformed two 2900+ line monoliths into modular architectures with comprehensive test coverage and multi-language support, (2) TokenMonitor cross-platform expansion—migrated from macOS-only to Windows/Linux support with polished float ball UI and official cost calculation integration, and (3) developed two production-ready skills (ccplan for requirement engineering with Feature Guard Protocol, cchypothesis for hypothesis-driven debugging with instrumented probing). Additionally documented MIHD spatial transcriptomics project issues and successfully deployed TEDDY foundation model on HPC cluster.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-29
item.description: 在HPC集群上分析TEDDY单细胞基础模型论文，修复现有提取脚本的4个关键bug，并成功完成DLPFC数据集的embedding提取部署。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-28
item.description: 提升cchypothesis的调试能力，实现智能双轨排查机制；修复TokenMonitor仪表板中的抖动问题以及窗口定位错误。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-27
item.description: 已经创建了一个基于假设调试技能（cchypothesis）的解决方案，并利用该技能成功解决了TokenMonitor界面闪烁这一复杂问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-26
item.description: Through five major iterations, the ccplan skills were systematically improved (including prompt calibration, multi-intention decomposition, feature protection protocols, etc.). The TokenMonitor was completely reimplemented, with improvements such as file division, type safety, and caching optimization. The float ball interface was developed and continuously refined across more than eight conversations. The cost calculation function was moved to the ccusage command-line tool. Relevant architectural documents were also provided for contributors.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-25
item.description: Three improvements have been made to the architecture: 1. Reorganization of the gadget project’s modules, reducing 2,934 modules to just 7 modules. 2. Optimization of the skill ecosystem, increasing the number of global skills from 50 to 28. Additionally, the skill functions for languages 1 to 4 have been improved. 3. Cross-platform adaptation of TokenMonitor: now supporting Windows/Linux/macOS platforms, instead of only macOS. Many vulnerabilities have also been fixed, and over 1,300 lines of code have been cleaned up.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-24
item.description: This module has been reorganized into a structure consisting of 8 components, with 72 test scenarios. Additionally, through the use of paper-based documentation, three Claude code skills have been designed. Furthermore, comprehensive cross-platform migration plans have been developed for TokenMonitor. More than 350 lines of code that were only applicable to macOS have been removed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: 在 DCC HPC 集群完成环境初始化（rclone 同步、GPU 节点调研、技能安装），并梳理 MIHD 研究项目的当前问题并写入文档。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W12
item.description: Achieved transformative breakthroughs across research, infrastructure, and production systems: proved Foundation Models (scGPT) essential for spatial transcriptomics zero-shot retrieval (100% vs 14% hit rate) while discovering Harmony’s fundamental batch correction limitations; designed complete error recovery pipeline reducing human demo requirements by 81% (1,740→329 samples) and fixed critical robosuite coordinate bug enabling large-scale scene generation (14,500+ scenes); replaced CalendarPro’s single-intent bottleneck with multi-intent classifier architecture eliminating 7-layer keyword hacks; implemented QCVLA improvement proposals via FLARE cross-project analysis; stabilized VLA inference system and separated training loss monitoring; built comprehensive academic profiling capability through Yuke Zhu 100-paper deep-wide analysis with 47-chunk segmentation; executed major gadget infrastructure overhaul with 5-mode research system, git history cleanup (94MB→516KB), unified Hugo staging architecture, and 30+ days historical report consolidation; optimized MIHD codebase eliminating O(N²) bottlenecks and duplicate code.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-22
item.description: The batch generation of historical reports for W05-W12 has been completed. Vulnerabilities in the deployment of key websites have been fixed (such as updates to the PaperMod theme and improvements to the robustness of the update.sh script). Additionally, the Hugo deployment architecture for Gadgets has been reengineered, resulting in a unified output/pre-release area for sites, a dropdown navigation function for bugJournal, and a mechanism for publishing benchmark test reports.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-21
item.description: The development environment is now ready. The critical errors in the abstract generation process have been fixed. Support for Codex has been implemented, and all AI agents have been upgraded to Opus 4.6.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-20
item.description: 该项目在配备小工具的MacBook上运行：批量生成了2026-03-19日的每日报告，全面更新了所有文档并进行了代码验证（修复了7个错误）；发现rclone sync-all中的漏洞并进行了修复（解决了由于缺少报告而导致对LLM重复调用的问题）；执行了完整的Git历史清理操作，使用rclone同步工具移除了452个个人文件，总大小为94MB；同时还将仓库大小从22MB减少到了516KB。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-19
item.description: Cross-device research and development have been conducted on multiple projects: spatial transcriptomics alignment experiments have revealed the trade-offs involved in semantic batch mixing; the robot error recovery process, from training optimization to portable deployment, has been validated through 139 tests. CalendarPro/Life Copilot has completed architectural reengineering, eliminating the bottleneck caused by single intent classifiers. Additionally, the knowledge management infrastructure has been expanded, including tools for improving the 5-mode system, capable of handling long-text analysis tasks. Yuke Zhu analyzed his academic trajectory from 2012 to 2026, publishing over 100 papers and undergoing more than ten analytical iterations. Furthermore, bulk integration processing was performed on 30 days of historical data from February to March 2026.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-18
item.description: In CalendarPro, a batch update feature has been added. This feature allows for the processing of multiple task status reports simultaneously. Currently, there is complete test coverage, and the relevant documentation has also been updated.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-17
item.description: 实现了跨设备的协作，以在MIHD空间组学重构方面取得进展；深入研究了QCVLA的潜在桥梁机制，并采用了受FLARE启发的改进方案；解决了VLA训练/推理基础设施中的相关问题；生成了用于错误基准测试的数据；同时提升了系统工具的性能。

item.title: Enes Eken — Research Associate Profile
item.description: Enes Eken的学术生涯可以分为三个不同的阶段。第一阶段（2014-2018年）专注于自旋转移扭矩随机存取存储器（STT-RAM）的可靠性设计。在这一时期，技术取得了显著进步，包括读写可靠性的提升，以及用于变量感知的仿真工具的开发，还有纠错码解决方案的应用。

item.title: Fan Chen — Research Associate Profile
item.description: Fan Chen: 在这个数据集中，“Fan Chen”很可能指的是多位具有相同名字的研究者的合集，而不是某个单一学者的完整研究历程。从论文内容来看，可以明显区分出至少两类不同的研究者：（1）一位长期从事分析化学/食品化学研究的研究者，他的研究活动持续了1992年至2022年，其研究领域从早期的法医气相色谱技术发展到了……

item.title: Hsin-Pai Cheng — Researcher Profile
item.description: Hsin-Pai Cheng is a researcher specializing in efficient AI systems and edge-based deployments. His academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. From 2016 to 2018, he focused on the IBM TrueNorth neuromorphic computing platform, conducting deep research into the quantization of neural networks under hardware constraints, as well as aspects related to adversarial robustness. He also made significant contributions to the field of “computational capabilities”.

item.title: Ismail Bayram — Researcher Profile
item.description: Ismail Bayram: Ismail Bayram是一位土耳其农业/兽医科学领域的实用型研究者，研究生涯横跨1999-2025年，核心专长为家禽（鹌鹑、肉鸡、蛋鸡）与反刍动物（绵羊、水牛、奶牛）的营养科学。其学术轨迹从基础饲料添加剂起步（益生菌、维生素、鱼粉替代原

item.title: Jiachen Mao — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jiachen Mao: Jiachen Mao的学术轨迹极为罕见，表现出多次跨领域的转型。他难以被归类为传统的“领域大师/新星”。在2015年至2018年期间，他的主要研究成果集中在建筑能耗模拟和城市微气候领域。他在高层建筑通风、能耗校准优化以及城市热岛效应分析方面发表了多篇重要论文。

item.title: Jie Guo — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jie Guo: It is necessary to point out a key issue: based on the actual content of the paper list, this does not represent the academic trajectory of a single researcher. Instead, it is the result of incorrect aggregation of data from multiple researchers with the same name (Guo Jie/Guo Jie). The papers with high citations between 2000 and 2005 (with a total of over 2000 citations) originated from a scholar who focused on ** Adolescent Substance Abuse and Social Development**.

item.title: Jun Lu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jun Lu: Jun Lu’s academic career can be divided into two distinct phases. The first phase (1989–2013) was dedicated to numerical calculations of electromagnetic fields, with a particular focus on the Harmonic Balance Finite Element Method and the design of high-frequency planar transformers. During this period, he established a solid theoretical foundation in the field of nonlinear magnetic field analysis. The key turning point occurred around 2013–2015.

item.title: L. Teng — Researcher Profile
item.description: L. Teng: L. Teng的学术轨迹呈现出高度碎片化的特征，论文横跨胶质瘤治疗、心脏干细胞、NADPH氧化酶血管生物学、海洋模式生物免疫学乃至GaAs量子阱自旋弛豫等完全不相关领域，这强烈提示该署名实为多位不同研究者的合并结果（同名合并问题）。若聚焦其

item.title: Linghao Song — Researcher Profile
item.description: Linghao Song is a researcher specializing in computer architecture. His research focuses on memory-based computing as the core theme throughout his work. In 2017, he won the Best Paper Award for his work on ReRAM-based graph processing accelerators. This achievement laid the foundation for his future contributions in this field.

item.title: Nathan Inkawhich — Researcher Profile
item.description: Nathan Inkawhich is a researcher who specializes in tackling the intersection of machine learning and SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) remote sensing recognition technologies. Since 2017, he has been working on both defense/remote sensing applications and deep learning security. His academic career reached its peak during 2019-2020, when he presented papers at CVPR and NeurIPS.

item.title: Wu Lin — Researcher Profile
item.description: Wu Lin: It should be noted that there is a significant issue of confusion regarding the names of these researchers. “Wu Lin” is a common Chinese name, and the database contains the research achievements of at least five researchers with similar names from different fields: ① Plant Soil Ecologists (regulatory mechanisms/rhizosphere microorganisms, 2001-2025, forming the core focus); ② Computer Vision Researchers (person recognition, 2

item.title: Xiangliu Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiangliu Chen — Early researcher

item.title: Xiaoxiao Liu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiaoxiao Liu: It should be noted that there is a significant name ambiguity problem in this paper list. The papers cover a wide range of unrelated fields, including cancer biology, GPU architecture, plant immunity, hyperspectral image processing, genomics, and LLM prompt engineering. Clearly, these papers were contributed by multiple researchers with the same name.

item.title: Xiongfei Yu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiongfei Yu: Xiongfei Yu的学术轨迹呈现出罕见的跨领域多段式发展模式，很可能由多位同名研究者的成果汇聚而成。第一阶段（1996—2004）集中于中国石油工程领域，专注于气藏凝析气预测、CO₂注入提高采收率（EOR）以及注气储层筛选评价，具有明显

item.title: Yan Yang — Researcher Profile
item.description: 严阳——早期的研究者

item.title: Yanyan Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yanyan Chen: Warning! The academic profile of “Yanyan Chen” suffers from a serious issue of name ambiguity. It is highly likely that Semantic Scholar has combined several researchers with the same name as “Yanyan Chen” into one profile.

item.title: Yingying Huang — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yingying Huang: 从论文列表中可以看出，“Yingying Huang”很可能是因为同名不同人的数据合并结果，而非某个单一研究者的学术成果。这些论文涉及了化学生物学领域（DNA与小分子相互作用、天然产物）、等离子体物理学（GS重建）、凝聚态物理学（VO₂相变）、表面物理学，以及机器学习等领域。

item.title: Yiran Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yiran Chen: Yiran Chen’s academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. The first stage (2003-2007) focused on optimizing the power consumption of traditional computer architectures, with deterministic clock gating being a key technique used in VLSI design. This period marked his solid foundation in this field. The second stage (2008-2015) saw him turning to emerging storage technologies as his research focus.

item.title: Yongfeng Ding — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yongfeng Ding is an emerging researcher in the early stages of their academic career. They began publishing papers in 2023, and currently have only four publications to their name. Therefore, they do not yet possess the characteristics of a ’leading expert in the field’. However, they have demonstrated certain levels of originality in the area of quantitative analysis of composite materials’ microstructure. Their key contributions focus on the concept of ‘randomness’, which was introduced by them in 2023.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-16
item.description: 已经完成了对空间转录组学相关基础模型的交叉嵌入诊断工作；设计并实现了一个错误恢复流程，使得数据量减少了81%；修复了robosuite坐标方面的关键漏洞；开始大规模场景生成的工作；与30多位研究人员合作，开发了一套学术分析工具。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W11
item.description: Transformative week spanning ML infrastructure, spatial transcriptomics, robotics research, and developer tooling. Achieved major breakthroughs: completed MIHD core algorithms with cross-sample evaluation (RM-IDEAL, CrossModalEnhancer), resolved critical VLA training bugs (56% gradient dilution, 33% speedup via dependency alignment), redesigned Error Recovery Benchmark v5.0 architecture, built comprehensive academic researcher profiling toolkit with multi-source integration, designed 4-group manipulation progress prediction framework for pi05, executed 7-phase CalendarPro optimization with parallel agents, unified gadget tools with centralized common/ package eliminating 400+ lines of duplication, and developed production-grade GPU monitoring for Kubernetes. Established foundation for next-generation spatial biology analysis and robot learning evaluation.

item.title: Haiyong Wang — Research Scientist Profile
item.description: Haiyong Wang — 早期研究人员

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-15
item.description: The CalendarPro system has been fully optimized. A 7-stage parallel processing approach has been adopted, and it has successfully passed 230 tests. Additionally, a unified toolkit for developing small tools has been developed, integrating paper retrieval, performance analysis, and citation information into a single command-line interface. The shared tools have been extracted and placed in a public package, thereby avoiding the need to write more than 400 lines of duplicate code. All output directories are now organized into a structured hierarchical structure. Furthermore, performance analyses have been conducted on 13 leading researchers in robotics and artificial intelligence, enabling systematic tracking of their academic research progress.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-14
item.description: The script for GPU monitoring features an adaptive UI, a HDF5 data visualization tool, as well as four sets of progress prediction experimental frameworks for the pi05 model.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-13
item.description: 这个学术研究人员画像工具利用了大型语言模型来进行轨迹分析，并且具有奖励识别功能。此外，该工具还能够跟踪RoboTwin Place双鞋任务中每一帧的操作进度。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-12
item.description: Fixed the sandbox permissions structure in the macOS Wallpaper app, and resolved issues related to PyTorch dependencies and CUDA compilation for deep learning evaluation environments.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-11
item.description: Multi-project productivity improvement: refactoring MIHD files and performance evaluation, development of K8s GPU monitoring tools, optimization of VLA training schemes (through improvements to the torch/torchvision library and leveraging JAX technology to optimize dependencies, resulting in a 33% speed increase).

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-10
item.description: 在多个项目开发日中，我们进行的任务包括：文档整理、空间转录组学的调试、机器人学习的优化，以及多个代码库之间出现的环境问题的排查。这些工作涉及到超过6个不同的代码框架。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-09
item.description: 已经完成了MIHD空间转录组的核心功能开发，包括跨样本RM-IDEAL评估、CrossModalEnhancer跨模态增强技术，以及scGPT文献调研工作。同时，推进了多个VLA/机器人项目的开发，如UniVLA文档处理、RoboTwin数据转换、流程匹配分析等。此外，还实现了gadget工具MCP的服务器化部署，并与CalendarPro进行了集成。最后，增强了research_scout对多数据源的支持能力。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W10
item.description: Intensive multi-project research and development week spanning spatial transcriptomics evaluation infrastructure, robotics training pipelines, personal automation systems, research tooling, and application development. Major breakthroughs: resolved critical BC-RNN evaluation reliability crisis (fixed 4 cascading bugs making metrics trustworthy), completed MIHD cross-sample RM-IDEAL benchmark revealing layer-specific performance patterns and STAIG architectural limitations, achieved Desktop Video production-grade stability (eliminated 100% bookmark restoration failures + implemented webpage wallpaper functionality), optimized Phoenix GPU utilization 5%→80%+ via HDF5 preloading, and built CalendarPro autonomous butler system with context-aware intent classification (360 tests passing). Established large-scale training infrastructure monitoring 10+ concurrent Pi0.5 LoRA jobs while launching FLARE D0×4 training. Developed research scout tool from scratch with bilingual support and two-stage LLM evaluation pipeline. Systematically addressed technical debt through comprehensive code audits, documentation synchronization, and testing.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-08
item.description: 扩展的研究工具，包括作者搜索功能以及更新的文档资料；能够生成错误情况的可视化展示；设计并实现了用于VLA训练的关键区域标注系统；同时还修复了RoboTwin的渲染基础设施问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-07
item.description: The project has been executed in parallel on four devices: development of the MIHD documentation system and research related to scGPT have been completed. The FLARE/Phoenix training module has been launched, and four issues related to BC-RNN have been resolved. The WKWebView has been used to implement the functionality for setting background images on desktop video websites. Historical reports for February over the past 20 days have been generated in bulk. The context-aware intent classification function within the CalendarPro tool has been implemented. Additionally, a comprehensive research paper management system has been built from scratch, including features such as language configuration, reverse initialization, and deduplication.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-06
item.description: 跨项目的合作包括空间转录组数据分析、CalendarPro软件的修复以及相关文档的完善；此外，还涉及机器人学习代码库的重构、Docker渲染堆栈的优化，以及Phoenix/FLARE训练流程的设计。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-05
item.description: Cross-device parallel development, covering the field of MIHD spatial transcriptomics (through RM-IDEAL cross-sample benchmark tests, revealing performance characteristics at various levels); improvements to the device toolkit (with monthly updates and comprehensive guidelines for using Claude’s code); debugging of the VLA/Openpi-moe training process (fixing issues during curobo installation and errors in standardization procedures); and comprehensive upgrade of the CalendarPro personal service system (adding 16 new features, achieving 31 goals, while conducting a system audit to identify critical vulnerabilities and potential risk mechanisms).

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-04
item.description: Multi-project research and documentation update: - Studied the cross-sample query evaluation method used in the QueST paper for spatial transcriptomics data. - Improved the Desktop Video CLAUDE.md tool. - Developed a comprehensive training guide for zhaoganlong self-reflection frameworks, including detailed explanations of each checkpoint. - Updated the error_recovery_benchmark document to align with the actual code implementation, including a redesigned process architecture.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-03
item.description: The MIHD cross-sample RM-IDEAL benchmark testing has been completed. This includes the design of the script, which consists of 781 lines of code. We also addressed various vulnerabilities and performed visual processing tasks. There are also 459 lines of documentation accompanying this work. On the DCC platform, we processed historical AI conversation logs over a period of 13 days and successfully converted these logs into structured daily reports. Additionally, we developed the BC-RNN/Pi0.5 evaluation framework. However, we encountered some critical configuration errors during the testing on the Tianhe platform. Finally, we improved the user interface of the screen saver and prepared the necessary website documentation.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-02
item.description: We have corrected several critical errors in the MIHD benchmark tests, which were caused by the limitations of the STAIG architecture. Additionally, we have resolved any permission-related issues associated with macOS sandboxes, using a security domain-based tagging mechanism to handle these problems. We have conducted extensive training on the GPU cluster using the Pi0.5 VLA dataset, and provided a detailed list of external dependencies required for the project. Furthermore, we identified potential bottlenecks in the GPU usage during the evaluation process.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W09
item.description: Intensive multi-device development week spanning spatial transcriptomics pipeline optimization, robot learning benchmarking, and macOS application development. Major breakthroughs included fixing a critical ML checkpoint loading bug improving clustering metrics by 44%, establishing comprehensive robot learning baselines revealing severe distribution shift in error recovery tasks (BC-RNN 98% on normal tasks vs 0.28% on error recovery), implementing production-ready macOS features with native design patterns, and completing large-scale codebase modernization (250K+ LOC refactoring). Successfully unified multi-modal annotation sources for VisiumHD analysis, achieved 100-500x speedup through systematic optimization, and delivered Desktop Video 4.1 with critical playback bugs fixed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-01
item.description: Cross-device work tasks have been completed: the integration of the MIHD high-quality dataset has been achieved, and multi-source annotations have been verified. A large-scale refactoring of the code library has been carried out, resulting in the cleanup of over 250,000 lines of code. Twenty-eight historical daily reports have been generated, and the workflow has been optimized. Additionally, issues with the BC-RNN/Pi0.5 training process have been fixed, enabling simultaneous training on six GPUs. Finally, Version 4.1 of Desktop Video has been released, with fixes for playback problems and a redesigned interface for the Liquid Glass module.

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-02
item.description: Intensive research month achieving breakthrough performance improvements in spatial transcriptomics (MIHD) and revealing fundamental limitations in robotic error recovery systems. MIHD project advanced through systematic debugging (coordinate bugs, checkpoint loading, hyperparameter misalignment) and infrastructure optimization (100-500x speedups, embedding caching), achieving valid research-grade metrics (ARI 0.17+). Simultaneously, Error Recovery benchmark scaled from 30 to 2000+ scenes but uncovered catastrophic VLA failure (0% success rates despite fine-tuning), exposing severe distribution shift problems requiring architectural rethinking. Month demonstrated that reproducibility requires holistic alignment across code, hyperparameters, environment, and downstream tools—not just correct logic.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-28
item.description: 先进的空间转录组学分析流程，支持Visium HD技术，并具备全面的RM-IDEAL基准测试能力。已经修复了scGPT模型加载过程中的关键问题，使得聚类指标提升了44%。同时实现了桌面壁纸功能“History”，并解决了多屏幕下的电源管理问题。此外，还建立了VLA评估流程，发现尽管对目标任务进行了训练，但Phoenix模型的性能仍然不佳。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-27
item.description: The Slurm cluster infrastructure was studied, the storage usage in the shared file system was analyzed, and the evaluation results of the machine learning models were reviewed, in order to understand their performance in error recovery.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-26
item.description: These tasks involve work on various devices: creating LaTeX-resumes on a MacBook; building a comprehensive BC-RNN image pattern training system with a multi-task evaluation framework; and exploring the evaluation infrastructure for the Pi0.5 model on the Tianhe platform.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-23
item.description: 通过向量化处理以及GPU批量处理技术，我们成功优化了MIHD融合流程，使得运行速度提高了100到500倍。此外，我们还改进了STAIG算法，使其能够支持多种视觉编码方式。我们在11张幻灯片中展示了全面的视觉优化实验成果，同时修复了错误恢复基准测试中的崩溃问题，并重新启动了Pi0.5 Phoenix的训练过程，同时还改进了监控机制。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W08
item.description: Intensive week advancing two major research projects: Error Recovery Benchmark transitioned from infrastructure (Phase I) to experimentation (Phase II) with VLA integration, natural error capture (271 scenarios), and baseline evaluation pipeline; MIHD spatial transcriptomics achieved critical debugging breakthroughs (coordinate system fix improving ARI 86%), architectural innovations (Vision Refinement two-stage fusion, embedding cache), and comprehensive documentation. Both projects now operationally ready for large-scale experimentation despite cluster access challenges.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-22
item.description: MIHD视觉精炼的两阶段融合实现已经完成，并且已经进行了初步测试和全面的文件清理工作。相关的文档也已经更新，同时生成了批量历史报告。此外，还执行了错误恢复基准测试的第二阶段评估，采用了GPU调度优化以及Pi0.5微调流程设置。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-21
item.description: 我们已经为pi0.5和mimicgen基线模型创建了评估流程脚本，但由于集群GPU访问权限的问题，无法继续进行后续操作。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-20
item.description: Two projects are currently underway with intensive infrastructure construction: the spatial transcriptomics caching system and the robotic technology error recovery data generation process.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-19
item.description: There are two important research projects: first, the comprehensive documentation of MIHD spatial transcriptomics data; second, analyzing the fundamental limitations of this visual encoder. In addition, we have completed the second phase of the error recovery benchmark test and formulated corresponding implementation plans.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-18
item.description: 我们已经修复了MIHD多模态融合基准测试中的关键空间坐标错误问题，并且已经建立了用于机器人策略可视化以及检查点管理的基础设施。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-17
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary:

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-16
item.description: The integration process for VLA with the error recovery benchmark tests (versions 4.3 to 4.5) has been completed. We have diagnosed and analyzed the crash issues in the MIHD clustering structure, and designed functionality for the dialogue summary module as mentioned in the daily reports.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W07
item.description: Intensive multi-project development week spanning spatial transcriptomics benchmarking, error recovery policy framework design, and developer tool enhancements. Completed PCA+UNI+STAIG fusion benchmarks across 7 DLPFC sections with enhanced metric visualizations, designed comprehensive 7-phase MIHD enhancement plan integrating Q-Former fusion and QueST-inspired features, expanded error recovery scene library by 293% (30→118 scenes) and fixed critical visualization bugs, implemented atomic writes and multi-device sync for gadget/summarize tool, refactored CalendarPro with recurring task support, and published historical reports to Hugo website. Key technical achievements include validating checkpoint recovery mechanisms in production, solving OSC controller compensation issues in robotic simulation, and establishing config-driven hyperparameter control patterns across multiple projects.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-15
item.description: Multi-project development day: Publish daily reports on the Hugo website. Monitor long-term MIHD benchmark experiments on the DCC cluster. Complete the refactoring of the CalendarPro code library and add a scheduled task function. Improved the Gadget/Summarize tools to support atomic writes and multi-device synchronization capabilities. Developed an advanced error recovery benchmark scheme, which includes 118 scenarios and a policy-based generation framework.

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-14
item.description: Summary of daily artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-13
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence discussions

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-12
item.description: We have improved the documentation for MIHD, and developed a detailed seven-stage optimization plan. This plan includes normalization techniques, Q-Former fusion methods, and feature design inspired by QueST.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-10
item.description: 已完成的空间转录组学基准测试采用了PCA、UNI和STAIG技术组合，应用于11块组织切片上，总共实现了7次成功运行。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-09
item.description: The visualization of the MIHD benchmark tests has been improved, with various metrics now displayed. Additionally, a comprehensive RM-Ideal evaluation of the DLPFC region has been initiated.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W06
item.description: Intensive week on MIHD spatial transcriptomics: discovered and fixed critical GCN+STAIG fusion bugs (6 issues including algorithmic alignment and hyperparameter mismatches causing 9x performance degradation), implemented RM-Ideal ground-truth evaluation framework, built public benchmark submission pipeline with ethical consent practices. Major learning: implementation bugs vs tuning issues require reference code comparison first.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-08
item.description: The RM-Ideal spatial niche matching evaluation algorithm has been implemented and integrated into the QueST and MIHD frameworks. This allows for realistic testing of the quality of embeddings.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-07
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-06
item.description: The process for submitting public benchmark results has been implemented. This process is deployed using GitHub Pages, and includes an interactive mechanism for user consent.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-05
item.description: The end-to-end GCN+STAIG fusion system has been implemented and debugged. Six critical issues were identified and fixed (including four algorithm alignment problems and two flexibility-related errors). Additionally, a hyperparameter tuning issue was detected, which resulted in a performance degradation of nine times.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-03
item.description: 我们已经修复了关于MIHD的基准测试文档不完整的问题，通过生成新的可视化结果并更新实验日志来完善相关内容。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-02
item.description: We have studied the benchmark results of MIHD and identified any missing relevant documentation.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W05
item.description: Successfully debugged and resolved critical MIHD spatial transcriptomics model performance regression (ARI 0.4→0.13), restoring performance to 0.28-0.45 through systematic root cause analysis. Identified environment configuration and clustering method (mclust vs kmeans) as critical factors, fixed gene feature dimensionality mismatch (3000D→50D PCA), and aligned GCN implementation with original STAIG paper architecture. Established foundation for future MIHD-STAIG integration work.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-01
item.description: 已经解决了MIHD空间转录组学模型性能下降的问题（性能从0.4降到了0.13）。我们实现了STAIG GCN对齐算法，并发现环境条件和聚类方法是影响模型性能的关键因素。

item.title: LeetCode每日一题 2025-12-05
item.description: 解决方案3432：计算具有相等和不相等划分的情况下的计算次数。

item.title: Weekly summaries for the W40 edition in 2025.
item.description: This week (2025-W40) only has valid session records for the day October 2nd. This session remained at the initialization stage. The user opened the core tracking and segmentation files of the AutoSeg-SAM2 project. However, the user did not proceed to any substantial development work. Therefore, overall this week there was no substantial progress or output.

item.title: Error log: 2025-10-02
item.description: In the AutoSeg-SAM2 project, open the relevant source files. Currently, the session has not actually begun.

item.title: LLM学习
item.description:
ChatGPT 4o Section

ChatGPT 4o API Example

from openai import OpenAI
model_use = "gpt-4o-2024-08-06"
client = OpenAI(api_key="Your-API-key")
completion = client.beta.chat.completions.parse(
	model=model_use,
	messages=[
		{"role": "system", "content": "Extract the event information."},
		{"role": "user", "content": "Alice and Bob are going to a science fair on Friday."},
	],
)
event = completion.choices[0].message.parsed

Note: I tried using the model “gpt-4o” but it didn’t work.

How to Create a ChatGPT API Key

  1. Log in to openai
  2. Use the search bar to find “API keys”
  3. Create a new key (only displayed once, disappears after closing the tab)
  4. Go to the billing page to top up your account

UniTox ChatGPT Section

Reading Data from fda.gov

  1. Read the drug labels we are interested in from a .csv file.

item.title: LeetCode Daily 2025-01-01
item.description: 1422. Maximum Score After Splitting a String

item.title: Random Ideas
item.description:
1. Does the RAM of a laptop continue to consume power even when the screen is turned off?
  2. Images inserted using Markdown do not automatically appear on the website.
  3. Add a checkbox to the “Random” function.
  4. English version of “Desktop Video” √
  5. What is the Duoboy algorithm?
  6. Multilingual support for “Desktop Video” √
  7. What makes a product a luxury item?
  8. Playing “Desktop Video” in the lockscreen mode.
  9. M4 Pro vs. M3 Max

Zijia (Thomas) Tang

Email: zijia.tang@duke.edu | Phone: +1 (858) 340-5757

Interest Areas: Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, AI4Science, Bioinformatics

Education

Duke University | Aug 2024 – Present

  • Major: Computer Science (B.S.)
  • GPA: 4.0 / 4.0
  • Relevant Coursework: Applied Machine Learning, Advanced Algorithms, Linear Algebra

Selected Publications

FLARE: A Failure-Aware Framework for Autonomous Correction and Recovery in VLA Co-First Author | CVPR 2026

  • Addressed the “brittleness” of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models where minor perturbations lead to catastrophic failure, aiming to endow robots with human-like resilience.
  • Proposed a novel Retry & Reset paradigm and designed a Perturbation & Bridging augmentation pipeline that systematically decouples robot pose from environment state to resolve In-Distribution (ID) errors.
  • Integrated Gemini-2.5-Pro as an offline failure analyst to mine object-centric “Reset” skills for Out-of-Distribution (OOD) recovery. Implemented using LoRA fine-tuning on Pi_0.5 backbones.
  • Achieved an 84.0% success rate across 9 contact-rich tasks in RoboMimic, outperforming previous SOTA by 26.2%.

scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction Co-Author | Published in Nature Communications (Impact Factor: 15.7)
